allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Get-Command python3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files'' -Filter ''node.exe'' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 FullName; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Users\\appas'' -Filter ''node.exe'' -Recurse -Depth 5 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 FullName")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Command iisexpress -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command php -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; dir ''C:\\Windows\\System32\\inetsrv\\'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3")

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Start-Job { Set-Location ''C:\\Users\\appas\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\HouseBath Dashboard''; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File serve.ps1 }; Start-Sleep 2; Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:3000/ -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty StatusCode")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Job -Name Job1 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Job -Name Job1 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; netstat -an | findstr '':3000''")
